---
title: "Projections"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
    toc: false
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdn.datatables.net/1.13.8/css/jquery.dataTables.min.css">
        <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdn.datatables.net/responsive/2.5.0/css/responsive.dataTables.min.css">

        <script src="https://code.jquery.com/jquery-3.7.1.min.js"></script>
        <script src="https://cdn.datatables.net/1.13.8/js/jquery.dataTables.min.js"></script>
        <script src="https://cdn.datatables.net/responsive/2.5.0/js/dataTables.responsive.min.js"></script>
        <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/papaparse@5.4.1/papaparse.min.js"></script>
---

<style>
.projection-button-row {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 10px;
  margin-bottom: 20px;
}

.proj-btn {
  background: #13294b;
  color: white;
  border: none;
  border-radius: 8px;
  padding: 10px 16px;
  font-weight: 600;
  cursor: pointer;
}

.proj-btn:hover {
  opacity: 0.9;
}

.proj-btn.active {
  background: #4b9cd3;
  color: #000;
}

#projection-filters {
  margin-bottom: 18px;
  font-weight: 500;
}

#projection-table-wrapper {
  width: 100%;
  max-width: 100%;
  overflow-x: auto;
  margin-top: 10px;
}

#projection-table {
  width: 100% !important;
  border-collapse: collapse !important;
  color: #111 !important;
  background: #fff !important;
  table-layout: auto;
}

.projection-highlight-col {
  font-weight: 600;
}

#projection-table thead th {
  color: #111 !important;
  background: #e9ecef !important;
  border-bottom: 1px solid #ccc !important;
  white-space: nowrap;
  font-weight: 700;
}

#projection-table tbody td {
  color: #111 !important;
  background: #fff !important;
  border-bottom: 1px solid #eee !important;
  white-space: nowrap;
}

table.dataTable thead th,
table.dataTable tbody td {
  white-space: nowrap;
  width: 1%;
}

.dataTables_wrapper {
  color: #111 !important;
}

.dataTables_wrapper .dataTables_filter input,
.dataTables_wrapper .dataTables_length select {
  color: #111 !important;
  background: #fff !important;
}

.filter-toolbar {
  margin-bottom: 18px;
}

.filter-toolbar-top {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 14px;
  margin-bottom: 12px;
}

.filter-toggle-btn {
  background: #13294b;
  color: white;
  border: none;
  border-radius: 8px;
  padding: 10px 16px;
  font-weight: 600;
  cursor: pointer;
}

.filter-toggle-btn:hover {
  opacity: 0.9;
}

.filter-help-text {
  font-weight: 500;
  color: #333;
}

.filter-panel {
  background: #f8f9fa;
  border: 1px solid #d9dee3;
  border-radius: 12px;
  padding: 16px;
  margin-top: 8px;
}

.filter-panel.hidden {
  display: none;
}

.filter-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(180px, 1fr));
  gap: 14px;
}

.filter-group {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 6px;
}

.filter-group label {
  font-weight: 600;
  color: #222;
}

.filter-group select,
.filter-group input {
  padding: 8px 10px;
  border: 1px solid #c9ced6;
  border-radius: 8px;
  background: #fff;
  color: #111;
}

.filter-group select[multiple] {
  min-height: 120px;
}

.filter-actions {
  display: flex;
  gap: 10px;
  margin-top: 16px;
}

.filter-action-btn {
  border: none;
  border-radius: 8px;
  padding: 10px 16px;
  font-weight: 600;
  cursor: pointer;
}

.apply-btn {
  background: #4b9cd3;
  color: #000;
}

.reset-btn {
  background: #dfe3e8;
  color: #111;
}

#projection-filters {
  margin-bottom: 18px;
}

.filter-toolbar-top {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 14px;
  margin-bottom: 12px;
}

.filter-toggle-btn {
  background: #13294b;
  color: white;
  border: none;
  border-radius: 8px;
  padding: 10px 16px;
  font-weight: 600;
  cursor: pointer;
}

.filter-toggle-btn:hover {
  opacity: 0.9;
}

.filter-help-text {
  font-weight: 500;
  color: #333;
}

.filter-panel {
  background: #f8f9fa;
  border: 1px solid #d9dee3;
  border-radius: 12px;
  padding: 16px;
  margin-top: 8px;
  display: none;
}

.filter-panel.show {
  display: block;
}

.filter-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(180px, 1fr));
  gap: 14px;
}

.filter-group {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 6px;
}

.filter-group label {
  font-weight: 600;
  color: #222;
}

.filter-group select,
.filter-group input {
  padding: 8px 10px;
  border: 1px solid #c9ced6;
  border-radius: 8px;
  background: #fff;
  color: #111;
}

.filter-group select[multiple] {
  min-height: 120px;
}

.filter-actions {
  display: flex;
  gap: 10px;
  margin-top: 16px;
}

.filter-action-btn {
  border: none;
  border-radius: 8px;
  padding: 10px 16px;
  font-weight: 600;
  cursor: pointer;
}

.apply-btn {
  background: #4b9cd3;
  color: #000;
}

.reset-btn {
  background: #dfe3e8;
  color: #111;
}

/* checkbox dropdown filters */
.checkbox-dropdown {
  position: relative;
  width: 100%;
}

.checkbox-dropdown-btn {
  width: 100%;
  text-align: left;
  padding: 10px 12px;
  border: 1px solid #c9ced6;
  border-radius: 8px;
  background: #fff;
  color: #111;
  cursor: pointer;
  font-size: 0.95rem;
}

.checkbox-dropdown-btn:hover {
  background: #f5f7fa;
}

.checkbox-dropdown-menu {
  display: none;
  position: absolute;
  top: calc(100% + 6px);
  left: 0;
  width: 100%;
  background: #fff;
  border: 1px solid #c9ced6;
  border-radius: 10px;
  box-shadow: 0 8px 22px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.12);
  z-index: 1000;
  padding: 10px;
}

.checkbox-dropdown-menu.show {
  display: block;
}

.checkbox-dropdown-search {
  width: 100%;
  padding: 8px 10px;
  border: 1px solid #c9ced6;
  border-radius: 8px;
  margin-bottom: 10px;
  font-size: 0.92rem;
}

.checkbox-actions-mini {
  display: flex;
  gap: 8px;
  margin-bottom: 10px;
}

.checkbox-mini-btn {
  border: 1px solid #c9ced6;
  background: #f8f9fa;
  color: #111;
  border-radius: 6px;
  padding: 5px 8px;
  font-size: 0.8rem;
  cursor: pointer;
}

.checkbox-options {
  max-height: 220px;
  overflow-y: auto;
  border-top: 1px solid #eef1f4;
  padding-top: 8px;
}

.checkbox-options.team-options {
  max-height: 320px;
}

.checkbox-option {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 8px;
  padding: 4px 2px;
  font-size: 0.92rem;
}

.checkbox-option input {
  margin: 0;
}

.filter-grid {
  align-items: start;
}

@media (max-width: 768px) {
  .checkbox-dropdown-menu {
    position: static;
    margin-top: 8px;
    box-shadow: none;
  }
}

#projection-table thead th.projection-highlight-col {
  background: #d9ecfb !important;
  color: #111 !important;
  font-weight: 700;
}

#projection-table tbody td.projection-highlight-col {
  background: #f4faff !important;
  font-weight: 600;
}

.dataTables_wrapper {
  width: 100% !important;
  max-width: 100% !important;
}

.dataTables_scrollBody {
  width: 100% !important;
}

td.details-control {
  text-align: center;
  cursor: pointer;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: #13294b;
}

td.details-control::before {
  content: "+";
  font-size: 16px;
}

tr.shown td.details-control::before {
  content: "−";
  font-size: 16px;
}

.dataTables_wrapper {
  width: 100% !important;
}

#projection-table-wrapper {
  overflow-x: visible;
}

/* transfer detail card */
.transfer-card-wrap {
  padding: 14px 18px;
  background: #f8fbff;
}

.transfer-card {
  background: #ffffff;
  border: 1px solid #d9e6f2;
  border-radius: 16px;
  padding: 18px 20px;
  box-shadow: 0 2px 10px rgba(19, 41, 75, 0.06);
  max-width: 950px;
  margin: 0 auto;
}

.transfer-card-top {
  display: flex;
  justify-content: space-between;
  align-items: flex-start;
  gap: 18px;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  margin-bottom: 14px;
}

.transfer-card-title {
  font-size: 1.15rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: #13294b;
  margin-bottom: 4px;
}

.transfer-card-subtitle {
  font-size: 0.92rem;
  color: #5b6573;
}

.transfer-card-score {
  text-align: right;
}

.transfer-card-score-value {
  font-size: 2rem;
  font-weight: 800;
  color: #111;
  line-height: 1;
  margin-bottom: 6px;
}

.transfer-risk-pill {
  display: inline-block;
  padding: 6px 10px;
  border-radius: 999px;
  font-size: 0.82rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  letter-spacing: 0.02em;
}

.transfer-risk-pill.low {
  background: #e6f4ea;   /* green */
  color: #1f6b35;
}

.transfer-risk-pill.moderate {
  background: #ffe5cc;   /* orange */
  color: #a04a00;
}

.transfer-risk-pill.high {
  background: #f8d7da;   /* red */
  color: #8b1e2d;
}

.transfer-card-section {
  margin-top: 14px;
}

.transfer-section-label {
  font-size: 0.88rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: #13294b;
  margin-bottom: 8px;
}

.transfer-scale-row {
  display: flex;
  justify-content: space-between;
  font-size: 0.8rem;
  color: #5f6b78;
  margin-top: 6px;
}

.transfer-bar-track {
  position: relative;
  width: 100%;
  height: 16px;
  background: linear-gradient(to right, #e8f4fb 0%, #d7eaf8 100%);
  border-radius: 999px;
  overflow: hidden;
}

.transfer-bar-fill {
  position: absolute;
  top: 0;
  left: 0;
  height: 100%;
  background: linear-gradient(to right, #4b9cd3 0%, #13294b 100%);
  border-radius: 999px;
}

.transfer-ci-wrap {
  position: relative;
  width: 100%;
  height: 28px;
  margin-top: 2px;
}

.transfer-ci-base {
  position: absolute;
  top: 12px;
  left: 0;
  right: 0;
  height: 4px;
  background: #d9dee3;
  border-radius: 999px;
}

.transfer-ci-range {
  position: absolute;
  top: 10px;
  height: 8px;
  background: #4b9cd3;
  border-radius: 999px;
}

.transfer-ci-dot {
  position: absolute;
  top: 6px;
  width: 16px;
  height: 16px;
  background: #13294b;
  border-radius: 50%;
  transform: translateX(-50%);
  border: 2px solid #fff;
  box-shadow: 0 1px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.18);
}

.transfer-ci-label-row {
  display: flex;
  justify-content: space-between;
  margin-top: 4px;
  font-size: 0.82rem;
  color: #4f5a67;
}

.transfer-stat-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(210px, 1fr));
  gap: 12px;
  margin-top: 14px;
}

.transfer-stat-box {
  background: #f6f9fc;
  border: 1px solid #e2e8ef;
  border-radius: 12px;
  padding: 12px 14px;
}

.transfer-stat-box-label {
  font-size: 0.8rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: #5b6573;
  margin-bottom: 5px;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.03em;
}

.transfer-stat-box-value {
  font-size: 1rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: #111;
}

.transfer-dist-wrap {
  margin-top: 6px;
}

.transfer-dist-track {
  position: relative;
  height: 10px;
  background: linear-gradient(to right, #edf4fa 0%, #d8e9f7 100%);
  border-radius: 999px;
}

.transfer-dist-marker {
  position: absolute;
  top: -4px;
  width: 0;
  height: 18px;
  border-left: 3px solid #13294b;
  transform: translateX(-50%);
}

.transfer-dist-ticks {
  display: flex;
  justify-content: space-between;
  margin-top: 6px;
  font-size: 0.76rem;
  color: #6b7682;
}

@media (max-width: 700px) {
  .transfer-card-score {
    text-align: left;
  }

  .transfer-card-score-value {
    font-size: 1.6rem;
  }
}
</style>

Use the buttons below to switch between projection views.

<div class="projection-button-row">
  <button class="proj-btn active" data-view="transfer">Transfer Likelihood</button>
  <button class="proj-btn" data-view="return">Return / Leave</button>
  <button class="proj-btn" data-view="destination">Destination Tier</button>
  <button class="proj-btn" data-view="bpm">Projected BPM</button>
</div>

<div id="projection-filters"></div>

<div id="projection-table-wrapper">
  <table id="projection-table" class="display nowrap" style="width:100%">
    <thead></thead>
    <tbody></tbody>
  </table>
</div>

<script>
let projectionData = [];
let filteredData = [];
let currentTable = null;
let currentView = "transfer";

const viewColumns = {
  transfer: [
    "player",
    "team",
    "conf",
    "class",
    "height",
    "GP",
    "PTS",
    "REB",
    "AST",
    "transfer_show"
  ],
  return: [
    "player",
    "team",
    "conf",
    "class",
    "height",
    "GP",
    "PTS",
    "REB",
    "AST",
    "return_show"
  ],
  destination: [
    "player",
    "team",
    "conf",
    "class",
    "height",
    "GP",
    "PTS",
    "REB",
    "AST",
    "destination_show"
  ],
  bpm: [
    "player",
    "team",
    "conf",
    "class",
    "height",
    "GP",
    "PTS",
    "REB",
    "AST",
    "bpm_show"
  ]
};

const detailColumns = {
  transfer: [
    "pred_transfer",
    "transfer_prob_mean",
    "transfer_prob_lo",
    "transfer_prob_hi"
  ],
  return: [
    "pred_return",
    "pred_leave",
    "return_prob_lo",
    "return_prob_hi"
  ],
  destination: [
    "pred_destination_tier",
    "dest_prob_high",
    "dest_prob_upper_mid",
    "dest_prob_low"
  ],
  bpm: [
    "pred_BPM_low",
    "pred_BPM_low_lo",
    "pred_BPM_low_hi",
    "pred_BPM_upper_mid",
    "pred_BPM_upper_mid_lo",
    "pred_BPM_upper_mid_hi",
    "pred_BPM_high",
    "pred_BPM_high_lo",
    "pred_BPM_high_hi"
  ]
};

const customColumnTitles = {
  class: "Year",
  
  transfer_show: "Transfer Likelihood",
  return_show: "Return Likelihood",
  destination_show: "Destination Tier",
  bpm_show: "Projected BPM",

  pred_transfer: "Predicted Transfer",
  transfer_prob_mean: "Transfer Prob Mean",
  transfer_prob_lo: "Transfer Prob Low",
  transfer_prob_hi: "Transfer Prob High",

  pred_return: "Predicted Return",
  pred_leave: "Predicted Leave",
  return_prob_lo: "Leave Prob Low",
  return_prob_hi: "Leave Prob High",

  pred_destination_tier: "Predicted Destination Tier",
  dest_prob_high: "High Major Probability",
  dest_prob_upper_mid: "Upper Mid Probability",
  dest_prob_low: "Low Major Probability",

  pred_BPM_low: "Projected BPM (Low Major)",
  pred_BPM_low_lo: "BPM Low CI",
  pred_BPM_low_hi: "BPM High CI",
  pred_BPM_upper_mid: "Projected BPM (Upper Mid)",
  pred_BPM_upper_mid_lo: "Upper Mid CI Low",
  pred_BPM_upper_mid_hi: "Upper Mid CI High",
  pred_BPM_high: "Projected BPM (High Major)",
  pred_BPM_high_lo: "High Major CI Low",
  pred_BPM_high_hi: "High Major CI High"
};

function prettifyLabel(col) {
  return col
    .replaceAll("_", " ")
    .replace(/\b\w/g, c => c.toUpperCase());
}

function toNumber(val) {
  if (val === null || val === undefined || val === "") return 0;
  const cleaned = String(val).replace(/%/g, "").trim();
  const num = parseFloat(cleaned);
  return isNaN(num) ? 0 : num;
}

function clamp(value, min, max) {
  return Math.min(Math.max(value, min), max);
}

function parseProbability(val) {
  if (val === null || val === undefined || val === "") return 0;
  const str = String(val).trim();

  if (str.includes("%")) {
    return clamp(toNumber(str) / 100, 0, 1);
  }

  const num = toNumber(str);

  if (num > 1) return clamp(num / 100, 0, 1);
  return clamp(num, 0, 1);
}

function pct1(value) {
  return `${(clamp(toNumber(value), 0, 1) * 100).toFixed(1)}%`;
}

function pct0(value) {
  return `${Math.round(clamp(toNumber(value), 0, 1) * 100)}%`;
}

function probToLeft(probValue) {
  return `${clamp(probValue, 0, 1) * 100}%`;
}

function ordinalSuffix(n) {
  const j = n % 10;
  const k = n % 100;
  if (j === 1 && k !== 11) return `${n}st`;
  if (j === 2 && k !== 12) return `${n}nd`;
  if (j === 3 && k !== 13) return `${n}rd`;
  return `${n}th`;
}

function formatTransferRankText(row) {
  const topPct = row.transfer_top_pct;
  const rank = row.transfer_rank_all;

  if (topPct === undefined || rank === undefined) return "Ranking unavailable";

  const roundedTopPct = Math.max(1, Math.round(topPct));
  return `Top ${roundedTopPct}% highest transfer likelihood (#${rank})`;
}

function formatTransferCard(row) {
  const displayProb = clamp(toNumber(row.transfer_display_num), 0, 1);
  const lo = clamp(toNumber(row.transfer_prob_lo_num), 0, 1);
  const hi = clamp(toNumber(row.transfer_prob_hi_num), 0, 1);

  const percentile = clamp(toNumber(row.transfer_percentile), 0, 100);
  const percentileFill = `${percentile}%`;

  const ciLeft = probToLeft(lo);
  const ciWidth = `${Math.max((hi - lo) * 100, 1.5)}%`;
  const dotLeft = probToLeft(displayProb);

  return `
    <div class="transfer-card-wrap">
      <div class="transfer-card">
        <div class="transfer-card-top">
          <div>
            <div class="transfer-card-title">Transfer Projection Summary</div>
            <div class="transfer-card-subtitle">
              Visual snapshot of predicted transfer likelihood, confidence range, and rank versus all players
            </div>
          </div>

          <div class="transfer-card-score">
            <div class="transfer-card-score-value">${pct1(displayProb)}</div>
            <div class="transfer-risk-pill ${row.transfer_risk_tier_class}">
              ${row.transfer_risk_tier} Risk
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="transfer-card-section">
          <div class="transfer-section-label">Transfer Likelihood Percentile Rank</div>
          <div class="transfer-bar-track">
            <div class="transfer-bar-fill" style="width:${percentileFill};"></div>
          </div>
          <div class="transfer-scale-row">
            <span>Low Risk</span>
            <span>High Risk</span>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="transfer-card-section">
          <div class="transfer-section-label">Confidence Interval</div>
          <div class="transfer-ci-wrap">
            <div class="transfer-ci-base"></div>
            <div class="transfer-ci-range" style="left:${ciLeft}; width:${ciWidth};"></div>
            <div class="transfer-ci-dot" style="left:${dotLeft};"></div>
          </div>
          <div class="transfer-ci-label-row">
            <span>0%</span>
            <span>50%</span>
            <span>100%</span>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="transfer-stat-grid">
          <div class="transfer-stat-box">
            <div class="transfer-stat-box-label">Rank vs All Players</div>
            <div class="transfer-stat-box-value">${formatTransferRankText(row)}</div>
          </div>

          <div class="transfer-stat-box">
            <div class="transfer-stat-box-label">Confidence Interval</div>
            <div class="transfer-stat-box-value">(${pct1(lo)}, ${pct1(hi)})</div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  `;
}

function formatReturnRankText(row) {
  const topPct = row.leave_top_pct;
  const rank = row.leave_rank_all;

  if (topPct === undefined || rank === undefined) return "Ranking unavailable";

  const roundedTopPct = Math.max(1, Math.round(topPct));
  return `Top ${roundedTopPct}% highest leave likelihood (#${rank})`;
}

function formatReturnCard(row) {
  const leaveProb = clamp(toNumber(row.leave_display_num), 0, 1);
  const returnProb = clamp(toNumber(row.return_display_num), 0, 1);

  const lo = clamp(toNumber(row.leave_prob_lo_num), 0, 1);
  const hi = clamp(toNumber(row.leave_prob_hi_num), 0, 1);

  const percentile = clamp(toNumber(row.leave_percentile), 0, 100);
  const percentileFill = `${percentile}%`;

  const ciLeft = probToLeft(lo);
  const ciWidth = `${Math.max((hi - lo) * 100, 1.5)}%`;
  const dotLeft = probToLeft(leaveProb);

  return `
    <div class="transfer-card-wrap">
      <div class="transfer-card">
        <div class="transfer-card-top">
          <div>
            <div class="transfer-card-title">Return / Leave Projection Summary</div>
            <div class="transfer-card-subtitle">
              Visual snapshot of predicted leave risk, return likelihood, confidence range, and rank versus all players
            </div>
          </div>

          <div class="transfer-card-score">
            <div class="transfer-card-score-value">${pct1(leaveProb)}</div>
            <div class="transfer-risk-pill ${row.leave_risk_tier_class}">
              ${row.leave_risk_tier} Risk
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="transfer-stat-grid" style="margin-top: 4px;">
          <div class="transfer-stat-box">
            <div class="transfer-stat-box-label">Chance to Return</div>
            <div class="transfer-stat-box-value">${pct1(returnProb)}</div>
          </div>

          <div class="transfer-stat-box">
            <div class="transfer-stat-box-label">Chance to Leave</div>
            <div class="transfer-stat-box-value">${pct1(leaveProb)}</div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="transfer-card-section">
          <div class="transfer-section-label">Leave Risk Percentile Rank</div>
          <div class="transfer-bar-track">
            <div class="transfer-bar-fill" style="width:${percentileFill};"></div>
          </div>
          <div class="transfer-scale-row">
            <span>Low Risk</span>
            <span>High Risk</span>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="transfer-card-section">
          <div class="transfer-section-label">Confidence Interval (Leave Probability)</div>
          <div class="transfer-ci-wrap">
            <div class="transfer-ci-base"></div>
            <div class="transfer-ci-range" style="left:${ciLeft}; width:${ciWidth};"></div>
            <div class="transfer-ci-dot" style="left:${dotLeft};"></div>
          </div>
          <div class="transfer-ci-label-row">
            <span>0%</span>
            <span>50%</span>
            <span>100%</span>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="transfer-stat-grid">
          <div class="transfer-stat-box">
            <div class="transfer-stat-box-label">Rank vs All Players</div>
            <div class="transfer-stat-box-value">${formatReturnRankText(row)}</div>
          </div>

          <div class="transfer-stat-box">
            <div class="transfer-stat-box-label">Leave Confidence Interval</div>
            <div class="transfer-stat-box-value">(${pct1(lo)}, ${pct1(hi)})</div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  `;
}

function enrichData(data) {
  const baseData = data.map(row => {
    const pts = toNumber(row.PTS);
    const reb = toNumber(row.REB);
    const ast = toNumber(row.AST);

    // ---- transfer ----
    const transferDisplay =
      row.transfer_show !== undefined && row.transfer_show !== ""
        ? parseProbability(row.transfer_show)
        : (
            row.pred_transfer !== undefined && row.pred_transfer !== ""
              ? parseProbability(row.pred_transfer)
              : parseProbability(row.transfer_prob_mean)
          );

    const transferMean =
      row.transfer_prob_mean !== undefined && row.transfer_prob_mean !== ""
        ? parseProbability(row.transfer_prob_mean)
        : transferDisplay;

    const transferLo = parseProbability(row.transfer_prob_lo);
    const transferHi = parseProbability(row.transfer_prob_hi);

    // ---- return / leave ----
    const rawReturn =
      row.pred_return !== undefined && row.pred_return !== ""
        ? parseProbability(row.pred_return)
        : (
            row.return_show !== undefined && row.return_show !== ""
              ? parseProbability(row.return_show)
              : 0
          );

    const rawLeave =
      row.pred_leave !== undefined && row.pred_leave !== ""
        ? parseProbability(row.pred_leave)
        : (1 - rawReturn);

    // normalize so they sum to 1
    const totalRL = rawReturn + rawLeave;
    const returnDisplay = totalRL > 0 ? rawReturn / totalRL : 0;
    const leaveDisplay = totalRL > 0 ? rawLeave / totalRL : (1 - returnDisplay);

    // if CI cols exist in dataset, use them; otherwise fallback to point estimate
    const leaveLo =
      row.return_prob_lo !== undefined && row.return_prob_lo !== ""
        ? parseProbability(row.return_prob_lo)
        : leaveDisplay;

    const leaveHi =
      row.return_prob_hi !== undefined && row.return_prob_hi !== ""
        ? parseProbability(row.return_prob_hi)
        : leaveDisplay;

    return {
      ...row,
      PRA: +(pts + reb + ast).toFixed(1),

      transfer_display_num: transferDisplay,
      transfer_prob_mean_num: transferMean,
      transfer_prob_lo_num: transferLo,
      transfer_prob_hi_num: transferHi,

      return_display_num: returnDisplay,
      leave_display_num: leaveDisplay,
      leave_prob_lo_num: leaveLo,
      leave_prob_hi_num: leaveHi
    };
  });

  // ---- transfer ranking ----
  const transferRanked = baseData
    .map((row, idx) => ({ idx, val: row.transfer_display_num }))
    .filter(x => !isNaN(x.val))
    .sort((a, b) => b.val - a.val);

  const totalTransferRanked = transferRanked.length;

  transferRanked.forEach((item, i) => {
    const rank = i + 1;
    const topPct = totalTransferRanked > 0 ? (rank / totalTransferRanked) * 100 : 100;
    const percentile = totalTransferRanked > 1
      ? ((totalTransferRanked - rank) / (totalTransferRanked - 1)) * 100
      : 50;

    baseData[item.idx].transfer_rank_all = rank;
    baseData[item.idx].transfer_top_pct = topPct;
    baseData[item.idx].transfer_percentile = percentile;
  });

  // ---- leave ranking ----
  const leaveRanked = baseData
    .map((row, idx) => ({ idx, val: row.leave_display_num }))
    .filter(x => !isNaN(x.val))
    .sort((a, b) => b.val - a.val);

  const totalLeaveRanked = leaveRanked.length;

  leaveRanked.forEach((item, i) => {
    const rank = i + 1;
    const topPct = totalLeaveRanked > 0 ? (rank / totalLeaveRanked) * 100 : 100;
    const percentile = totalLeaveRanked > 1
      ? ((totalLeaveRanked - rank) / (totalLeaveRanked - 1)) * 100
      : 50;

    baseData[item.idx].leave_rank_all = rank;
    baseData[item.idx].leave_top_pct = topPct;
    baseData[item.idx].leave_percentile = percentile;
  });

  // ---- risk tiers ----
  baseData.forEach(row => {
    const transferPercentile = clamp(toNumber(row.transfer_percentile), 0, 100);
    let transferRiskTier = "Medium";
    let transferRiskTierClass = "moderate";

    if (transferPercentile >= 80) {
      transferRiskTier = "High";
      transferRiskTierClass = "high";
    } else if (transferPercentile <= 20) {
      transferRiskTier = "Low";
      transferRiskTierClass = "low";
    }

    row.transfer_risk_tier = transferRiskTier;
    row.transfer_risk_tier_class = transferRiskTierClass;

    const leavePercentile = clamp(toNumber(row.leave_percentile), 0, 100);
    let leaveRiskTier = "Medium";
    let leaveRiskTierClass = "moderate";

    if (leavePercentile >= 80) {
      leaveRiskTier = "High";
      leaveRiskTierClass = "high";
    } else if (leavePercentile <= 20) {
      leaveRiskTier = "Low";
      leaveRiskTierClass = "low";
    }

    row.leave_risk_tier = leaveRiskTier;
    row.leave_risk_tier_class = leaveRiskTierClass;
  });

  return baseData;
}

function getCheckedValues(filterName) {
  return Array.from(document.querySelectorAll(`input[name="${filterName}"]:checked`))
    .map(input => input.value);
}

function createCheckboxDropdown({
  id,
  label,
  values,
  buttonText,
  searchPlaceholder = "Search...",
  large = false
}) {
  const optionsHtml = values.map(value => `
    <label class="checkbox-option" data-value="${String(value).toLowerCase()}">
      <input type="checkbox" name="${id}" value="${value}">
      <span>${value}</span>
    </label>
  `).join("");

  return `
    <div class="filter-group">
      <label>${label}</label>
      <div class="checkbox-dropdown" id="${id}-dropdown">
        <button type="button" class="checkbox-dropdown-btn" id="${id}-btn">
          ${buttonText}
        </button>
        <div class="checkbox-dropdown-menu" id="${id}-menu">
          <input
            type="text"
            class="checkbox-dropdown-search"
            id="${id}-search"
            placeholder="${searchPlaceholder}"
          >
          <div class="checkbox-actions-mini">
            <button type="button" class="checkbox-mini-btn" data-action="select-all" data-target="${id}">
              Select All
            </button>
            <button type="button" class="checkbox-mini-btn" data-action="clear-all" data-target="${id}">
              Clear
            </button>
          </div>
          <div class="checkbox-options ${large ? "team-options" : ""}" id="${id}-options">
            ${optionsHtml}
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  `;
}

function updateDropdownButtonText(filterName, defaultText) {
  const checked = getCheckedValues(filterName);
  const btn = document.getElementById(`${filterName}-btn`);

  if (!btn) return;

  if (checked.length === 0) {
    btn.textContent = defaultText;
  } else if (checked.length <= 2) {
    btn.textContent = checked.join(", ");
  } else {
    btn.textContent = `${checked.length} selected`;
  }
}

function setupCheckboxDropdown(filterName, defaultText) {
  const btn = document.getElementById(`${filterName}-btn`);
  const menu = document.getElementById(`${filterName}-menu`);
  const search = document.getElementById(`${filterName}-search`);
  const optionsWrap = document.getElementById(`${filterName}-options`);

  btn.addEventListener("click", function(e) {
    e.stopPropagation();

    document.querySelectorAll(".checkbox-dropdown-menu.show").forEach(openMenu => {
      if (openMenu !== menu) openMenu.classList.remove("show");
    });

    menu.classList.toggle("show");
  });

  search.addEventListener("input", function() {
    const term = this.value.toLowerCase().trim();
    const options = optionsWrap.querySelectorAll(".checkbox-option");

    options.forEach(option => {
      const value = option.getAttribute("data-value");
      option.style.display = value.includes(term) ? "flex" : "none";
    });
  });

  optionsWrap.querySelectorAll(`input[name="${filterName}"]`).forEach(input => {
    input.addEventListener("change", function() {
      updateDropdownButtonText(filterName, defaultText);
    });
  });
}

function renderFilterUI() {
  const filtersContainer = document.getElementById("projection-filters");

  const teams = uniqueSortedValues(projectionData, "team");
  const confs = uniqueSortedValues(projectionData, "conf");
  const roles = uniqueSortedValues(projectionData, "Role");
  const years = uniqueSortedValues(projectionData, "class");

  filtersContainer.innerHTML = `
    <div class="filter-toolbar-top">
      <button id="toggle-filters-btn" class="filter-toggle-btn">Filters</button>
      <div class="filter-help-text">Sort by clicking any column header.</div>
    </div>

    <div id="filter-panel" class="filter-panel">
      <div class="filter-grid">
        ${createCheckboxDropdown({
          id: "team-filter",
          label: "Team",
          values: teams,
          buttonText: "Select team(s)",
          searchPlaceholder: "Search teams...",
          large: true
        })}

        ${createCheckboxDropdown({
          id: "conf-filter",
          label: "Conference",
          values: confs,
          buttonText: "Select conference(s)",
          searchPlaceholder: "Search conferences..."
        })}

        ${createCheckboxDropdown({
          id: "role-filter",
          label: "Role",
          values: roles,
          buttonText: "Select role(s)",
          searchPlaceholder: "Search roles..."
        })}
        
        ${createCheckboxDropdown({
          id: "year-filter",
          label: "Year",
          values: years,
          buttonText: "Select year(s)",
          searchPlaceholder: "Search year..."
        })}

        <div class="filter-group">
          <label for="gp-min-filter">Min GP</label>
          <input type="number" id="gp-min-filter" min="0" placeholder="e.g. 10">
        </div>

        <div class="filter-group">
          <label for="pts-min-filter">Min PTS</label>
          <input type="number" id="pts-min-filter" min="0" step="0.1" placeholder="e.g. 8">
        </div>

        <div class="filter-group">
          <label for="mp-min-filter">Min MP</label>
          <input type="number" id="mp-min-filter" min="0" step="0.1" placeholder="e.g. 15">
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="filter-actions">
        <button id="apply-filters-btn" class="filter-action-btn apply-btn">Apply Filters</button>
        <button id="reset-filters-btn" class="filter-action-btn reset-btn">Reset Filters</button>
      </div>
    </div>
  `;

  const toggleBtn = document.getElementById("toggle-filters-btn");
  const filterPanel = document.getElementById("filter-panel");
  const applyBtn = document.getElementById("apply-filters-btn");
  const resetBtn = document.getElementById("reset-filters-btn");

  toggleBtn.addEventListener("click", function() {
    filterPanel.classList.toggle("show");
  });

  applyBtn.addEventListener("click", function() {
    applyFilters();
  });

  resetBtn.addEventListener("click", function() {
    resetFilters();
  });

  setupCheckboxDropdown("team-filter", "Select team(s)");
  setupCheckboxDropdown("conf-filter", "Select conference(s)");
  setupCheckboxDropdown("role-filter", "Select role(s)");
  setupCheckboxDropdown("year-filter", "Select year(s)");

  document.querySelectorAll(".checkbox-mini-btn").forEach(btn => {
    btn.addEventListener("click", function() {
      const target = this.dataset.target;
      const action = this.dataset.action;
      const boxes = document.querySelectorAll(`input[name="${target}"]`);

      boxes.forEach(box => {
        if (action === "select-all") box.checked = true;
        if (action === "clear-all") box.checked = false;
      });

      const defaultMap = {
        "team-filter": "Select team(s)",
        "conf-filter": "Select conference(s)",
        "role-filter": "Select role(s)",
        "year-filter": "Select year(s)"
      };

      updateDropdownButtonText(target, defaultMap[target]);
    });
  });

  document.addEventListener("click", function(e) {
    if (!e.target.closest(".checkbox-dropdown")) {
      document.querySelectorAll(".checkbox-dropdown-menu.show").forEach(menu => {
        menu.classList.remove("show");
      });
    }
  });
}

function uniqueSortedValues(data, key) {
  return [...new Set(
    data.map(row => row[key]).filter(v => v !== null && v !== undefined && String(v).trim() !== "")
  )].sort((a, b) => String(a).localeCompare(String(b)));
}

function applyFilters() {
  const selectedTeams = getCheckedValues("team-filter");
  const selectedConfs = getCheckedValues("conf-filter");
  const selectedRoles = getCheckedValues("role-filter");
  const selectedYears = getCheckedValues("year-filter");

  const minGP = toNumber(document.getElementById("gp-min-filter").value);
  const minPTS = toNumber(document.getElementById("pts-min-filter").value);
  const minMP = toNumber(document.getElementById("mp-min-filter").value);

  filteredData = projectionData.filter(row => {
    const teamMatch = selectedTeams.length === 0 || selectedTeams.includes(row.team);
    const confMatch = selectedConfs.length === 0 || selectedConfs.includes(row.conf);
    const roleMatch = selectedRoles.length === 0 || selectedRoles.includes(row.Role);
    const yearMatch = selectedYears.length === 0 || selectedYears.includes(row.class);

    const gpMatch = toNumber(row.GP) >= minGP;
    const ptsMatch = toNumber(row.PTS) >= minPTS;
    const mpMatch = toNumber(row.MP) >= minMP;

    return teamMatch && confMatch && roleMatch && yearMatch && gpMatch && ptsMatch && mpMatch;
  });

  buildTable(currentView);
}

function resetFilters() {
  ["team-filter", "conf-filter", "role-filter", "year-filter"].forEach(filterName => {
    document.querySelectorAll(`input[name="${filterName}"]`).forEach(box => {
      box.checked = false;
    });
  });

  document.getElementById("gp-min-filter").value = "";
  document.getElementById("pts-min-filter").value = "";
  document.getElementById("mp-min-filter").value = "";

  updateDropdownButtonText("team-filter", "Select team(s)");
  updateDropdownButtonText("conf-filter", "Select conference(s)");
  updateDropdownButtonText("role-filter", "Select role(s)");
  updateDropdownButtonText("year-filter", "Select year(s)");

  filteredData = [...projectionData];
  buildTable(currentView);
}

function formatRowDetails(row, viewName) {
  if (viewName === "transfer") {
    return formatTransferCard(row);
  }

  if (viewName === "return") {
    return formatReturnCard(row);
  }

  const detailCols = detailColumns[viewName] || [];

  const validDetailCols = detailCols.filter(col =>
    Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(row, col)
  );

  if (validDetailCols.length === 0) {
    return `<div style="padding:10px 14px;">No additional details available.</div>`;
  }

  const rowsHtml = validDetailCols.map(col => `
    <tr>
      <td style="font-weight:600; padding:6px 12px; border-bottom:1px solid #eee;">
        ${customColumnTitles[col] || prettifyLabel(col)}
      </td>
      <td style="padding:6px 12px; border-bottom:1px solid #eee;">
        ${row[col] ?? ""}
      </td>
    </tr>
  `).join("");

  return `
    <div style="padding:12px 18px; background:#f8fbff;">
      <table style="width:100%; border-collapse:collapse;">
        <tbody>
          ${rowsHtml}
        </tbody>
      </table>
    </div>
  `;
}

function buildTable(viewName) {
  currentView = viewName;

  const dataToUse = filteredData.length ? filteredData : projectionData;
  if (!dataToUse || dataToUse.length === 0) return;

  const cols = viewColumns[viewName];
  const validCols = cols.filter(col =>
    Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(dataToUse[0], col)
  );

  const columns = [
    {
      className: 'details-control',
      orderable: false,
      data: null,
      defaultContent: '',
      title: '',
      width: '30px'
    },
    ...validCols.map(col => ({
      title: customColumnTitles[col] || prettifyLabel(col),
      data: col,
      defaultContent: "",
      className: [
        "transfer_show",
        "return_show",
        "destination_show",
        "bpm_show"
      ].includes(col) ? "projection-highlight-col" : ""
    }))
  ];

  if (currentTable) {
    currentTable.destroy();
    $('#projection-table').empty();
  }

  currentTable = $('#projection-table').DataTable({
    data: dataToUse,
    columns: columns,
    pageLength: 25,
    responsive: false,
    scrollX: false,
    order: [],
    autoWidth: true,
    deferRender: true
  });

  $('#projection-table tbody').off('click', 'td.details-control');

  $('#projection-table tbody').on('click', 'td.details-control', function () {
    const tr = $(this).closest('tr');
    const row = currentTable.row(tr);

    if (row.child.isShown()) {
      row.child.hide();
      tr.removeClass('shown');
    } else {
      row.child(formatRowDetails(row.data(), viewName)).show();
      tr.addClass('shown');
    }
  });
}

Papa.parse("data/complete_2026_scored.csv", {
  download: true,
  header: true,
  skipEmptyLines: true,
  complete: function(results) {
    projectionData = enrichData(results.data);
    filteredData = [...projectionData];

    if (!projectionData || projectionData.length === 0) {
      document.getElementById("projection-filters").innerText = "No data loaded.";
      return;
    }

    renderFilterUI();
    buildTable("transfer");
  },
  error: function(error) {
    document.getElementById("projection-filters").innerText = "Error loading data.";
    console.error(error);
  }
});

document.querySelectorAll(".proj-btn").forEach(button => {
  button.addEventListener("click", function() {
    document.querySelectorAll(".proj-btn").forEach(btn =>
      btn.classList.remove("active")
    );

    this.classList.add("active");
    buildTable(this.dataset.view);
  });
});
</script>
